name: Corn Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in order given.
2. Pour the mixture into a well-greased casserole dish.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
Microwave Instructions:
1. Mix the ingredients as listed above.
2. Cook on 2/3 power of 650-700 watts for 10 minutes, stirring once after 5 minutes.
3. Turn the power to high and microwave until the pudding appears firm (dry) across the top, about 3 minutes.
